prompt: Create a cinematic cyberpunk anime action scene in a rainy neon-lit alley at night. Two main fighters face off in the center: on the left, a mysterious ronin wearing a wide straw kasa hat and a long torn black cloak, seen mostly from behind in a low battle stance, holding a katana; on the right, an armored ninja-samurai with a demonic oni-style mask and glowing red eyes lunges forward with two blades, one extended outward and one crossing the clash. Their swords meet at the center in a brilliant cyan-white energy burst, throwing sharp electric sparks and turquoise lightning arcs across the wet street. The setting is a dense futuristic Japanese city alley with reflective cobblestone pavement, heavy rain, puddles, mist, exposed pipes, hanging cables, umbrellas in the background, and many vertical neon signs with Japanese/Chinese-style characters in pink, cyan, blue, orange, and purple. Use a dynamic wide 16:9 composition, dramatic perspective, high contrast rim lighting, motion streaks, rain splashes around the fighters’ feet, detailed armor and cloth folds, glowing reflections on the ground, dark blue atmospheric shadows, and polished high-end anime concept art quality. Keep exactly two combatants, no readable English text, no logos, no watermark.
